g.text: RoomBuilder → Room → NodeBuilder → SNManager, MNManager, ANManager → oPhyGains
compute_noise(): TIA noise + shot noise (downlink PD/PV, uplink)
compute_metrics(): SNR, BER (PD via Q-function, PV via PV model)
set_tx_power() → min power to hit target BER / RF sensitivity
calc_cycle_energy(): init → sense → process → Tx (IR/RF) → wait → Rx → sleep
uses IRdriver + RF_calc_I to model Tx current draw per cycle

svg.text: Outputs: snr_d/u_dB, BER_d/u, p_req, E_day_net, days_to_empty
